visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top, stands in a Costco warehouse aisle. She holds a green and white box labeled 'USII Produce Zipper Bags' and gestures enthusiastically towards it. The background is filled with wooden pallets and bulk inventory under bright indoor lighting. (2) The camera shifts to a close-up of the product box. The woman's hands rotate the packaging to display different sides, highlighting the '32' count and vegetable graphics. The lighting remains bright, emphasizing the product details. (3) A cut displays the store's price tag on a shelf, showing '$ 339' in bold red numbers alongside the product description. The surrounding environment consists of more cardboard boxes and warehouse racking. (4) The woman is back on screen, pointing to a preservation comparison chart on the back of the box. She uses her fingers to trace the icons of vegetables and bananas. Vibrant graphic overlays and star emojis appear around the product. (5) A final close-up shows two boxes of the produce bags stacked together. Small text and graphics about '7 days' of freshness are visible. The woman continues to gesture toward the box with a smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹又來補貨了. (2) [Variety]: 無限回購. [Subtitle]: 高效鎖鮮蔬果袋. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們家都拿來裝. (4) [Subtitle]: 烤好的地瓜. [Variety]: 超棒的. (5) [Subtitle]: 它這個呢可以一直重複用. (6) [Subtitle]: 我每次用完就把它繼續用. [Variety]: 很節省. (7) [Subtitle]: 就是還蠻不錯而且好市多這樣買一個只要 5.95. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇這是一般的夾鏈袋價格哎. (9) [Subtitle]: 而且它可以重複使用. [Variety]: 重!!. (10) [Subtitle]: 339元有兩大袋然後最重要是還有特大袋跟大袋. [Variety]: 特大袋"跟大袋. (11) [Subtitle]: 還不錯我記得好像這放裡面會保存比較久. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒錯你的菜呀或水果就會比較耐放. (13) [Subtitle]: 夏天到了這樣也比較不容易長果蠅.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black short-sleeved top with slightly puffed shoulders.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and bulk-packaged items in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female voice begins narrating at a fast pace with a bright, friendly tone. Upbeat electronic BGM with a strong rhythmic pulse (approx. 124 BPM) kicks in. A 'pop' SFX sounds as the first text bubble appears. (2) The narrator's speech becomes more expressive as she describes storing sweet potatoes. A second female voice off-camera provides a brief, supportive interjection. A playful 'cartoon' SFX accentuates the mention of 'super good'. (3) As the price is mentioned, a metallic 'ding' SFX coincides with the visual price tag. The music continues unabated with a consistent major-key synth melody. Ambient noise is minimal, with very light rustling from the cardboard box. (4) The narrator explains the technical benefits of the bag. Frequent 'whoosh' and 'pop' SFX accompany the rapid visual transitions between graphics. The vocal pitch is high, maintaining an engaging atmosphere. (5) The recording concludes with both voices discussing fruit fly prevention. A final 'sparkle' SFX sounds as the narrator smiles. The audio ends with a quick hard cut on both the voice and the music track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> User Experience -> Price Reveal -> Functional Proof -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review the USII Produce Zipper Bags sold at Costco. It leverages the creator's personal endorsement to highlight product benefits like reusability, cost-effectiveness, and superior food preservation capabilities compared to standard bags.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, price highlighting, and positive personal testimonials about usage and effectiveness.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media shopping recommendation video. The combination of bright visuals, fast editing, and upbeat audio creates a persuasive and engaging promotional atmosphere.
